name: Snapper Mexicano
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle fish with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Pat the fish dry with paper towels.
3. Place fish fillets in a single layer in a 9-inch square baking dish or round pie dish.
4. Sprinkle half of the garlic powder, half of the cumin, and half of the cilantro over the fish.
5. Add mushrooms, chopped chile, sliced green onions, and finely chopped tomato.
6. Sprinkle remaining garlic powder, cumin, and cilantro over the vegetables.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
8. Combine the shredded Cheddar cheese and Monterey Jack cheese.
9. Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the fish.
10. Continue baking for 5-10 more minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork and the cheese is melted.
